episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 464: Aetherdrift Top Cards + Final Fantasy Previews
episode.description: Cliff and James provide all the latest in Magic card price movement, meta analysis and the latest news on top Aetherdrift cards for Modern and EDH, as well the best new Final Fantasy cards previewed this week.
